chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1118 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 10-10-2024 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G a/w Najaf Ali Janwari, Accounts Clerk, Municipal Committee, Khairpur. ***** On the last date of hearing viz. 29.08.2024, it was agreed that balance amount of Rs.11,62,698/- would be paid to the petitioner in two equal installments. Today, Accounts Clerk, MC, Khairpur states that cheque of Rs.5,81,349/- dated 04.10.2024 has already been received by the petitioner and balance amount will be paid to the petitioner till 10.11.2024. In case the cheque is dis-honored, the respondents- Municipal Corporation, Khairpur shall be exposed to contempt of Court proceedings. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of in the above manner. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
